title: Interop Benchmark v2 — rule-scored question
description: One rule-scored question over a base case. Gold is grounded in the raw payload; the core benchmark uses no LLM judge. For public questions gold lives in the versioned task snapshot. For sealed questions gold exists only inside the sealed bundle and MUST be absent from any tracked manifest.

field.description: The addressed field / target of the question.

match.description: Explicit, versioned match policy. New policies require a contract_version bump.

gold.description: Grounded gold answer. Present for public questions only; MUST be absent for sealed-heldout questions in any tracked manifest.

critical.description: True only for critical categories: exact full-path locator, relation, ordering, negative-evidence, actionability.

evidence_span_count.description: Number of raw-payload evidence spans grounding the gold.
